compiled_state.title: Implement tokens_merge.py: update visual sections, preserve behavioral sections
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/tokens_merge.py with merge_tokens() that updates the visual sections of tokens.md while preserving the four behavioral sections verbatim.

## testing_mode: RED — new behavioral content. Depends on RED test task 1a9d-7da0.

## Interface
merge_tokens(original_tokens_md: str, figma_derived: dict, designer_added: list, designer_removed: list) -> str
Returns: updated tokens.md content as string.

## Behavioral sections to preserve verbatim (do not modify)
- Interaction Behaviors
- Responsive Rules
- Accessibility Specification
- State Definitions

## Visual sections to update from Figma
- Component Inventory (add NEW components, remove designer-removed)
- Visual Properties (update fills, strokes, dimensions from Figma data)

## Implementation Steps
1. Parse tokens.md into sections using markdown heading detection
2. Identify behavioral vs visual sections by header name
3. Update visual sections with Figma-derived data; leave behavioral section content unchanged
4. For designer-added components: append new entry with INCOMPLETE behavioral spec placeholder
5. For designer-removed components: remove their token entries from visual sections

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/tokens_merge.py exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/tokens_merge.py
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py exits 0 (TM-1 through TM-7 pass)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_tokens.py --tb=short -q
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
